mapper.select: /** UsptStdrRsltIdxDao.selectList */ select stdr_bsns_cd , rslt_idx_id , rslt_idx_nm , std_idx , rslt_idx_type_cd from uspt_stdr_rslt_idx where stdr_bsns_cd = #{stdrBsnsCd}
/** UsptStdrRsltIdxDao.selectRsltIdxIemList */ select rslt_idx_detail_iem_id , detail_iem_nm , iem_unit_cd from uspt_stdr_rslt_idx_detail_iem where rslt_idx_id = #{rsltIdxId}
/** UsptStdrRsltIdxDao.selectStdIdxIemList */ select rslt_idx_std_iem_id , std_iem_nm , iem_unit_cd from uspt_stdr_rslt_idx_std_iem where rslt_idx_id = #{rsltIdxId}
